title: Harvest of Despair
overview: Via the New York Times: "...a frankly biased, angry recollection of the great, "man-made" famine of 1932-1933 in which up to seven million people starved to death in the Ukraine. It is the film's thesis that Stalin was directly responsible by his ruthless expropriation of virtually all of the grain harvested in the Ukraine over a two-year period."

trailers.title: Harvest of Despair - The 1933 Ukrainian Holodomor Famine Genocide (Documentary)
"Harvest of Despair" (English) - a documentary film about Holodomor in Ukraine in 1932 - 1933
